steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage notes that scholars overlook nuances in an author’s style when they focus only on obvious traits.

Discount means to disregard or treat as unimportant, which matches the idea of overlooking subtleties. The other choices either mean to examine closely, enlarge, or criticize, which do not convey ignoring subtleties. That matches choice A — A is correct.
steps.title: Match the meaning
